name: Black Beans and Yellow Rice
recipeInstructions:
Cook rice mix according to package directions; keep warm.
Drain beans, reserving 2 tablespoons liquid. Combine beans, reserved liquid, lime juice,
chili powder, and cumin in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until thoroughly heated;
stir in 2 tablespoons cilantro. Serve beans over rice; sprinkle with remaining cilantro.
Garnish with sour cream, green onions, and additional cilantro, if desired.
